documentationRules.category: Question Selection Rules for Italy Student Visa Interview Preparation
documentationRules.description: Intelligent question selection system that adapts question sets based on applicant profile and answers to optimally prepare students for Italy student visa interviews.

ruleTypes: CORE_REQUIREMENTS - Always included questions for any Italy student
PROFILE_BASED - Triggered based on applicant's education level and career stage
CONDITIONAL_CONCERNS - Triggered when specific risk factors or strengths are identified
SCENARIO_SPECIFIC - Triggered for special circumstances (visa history, employment status, language proficiency, etc.)
FIELD_SPECIFIC - Adapted question focus based on program and field of study
conditionTypes: OR (at least one condition must be true)

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Basic Profile & Identity
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include basic identity and profile questions as foundation for Italy student visa interview

actions.reason: Basic identity verification establishes applicant eligibility and forms foundation for Italy student visa assessment

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Study Plans & Motivation
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include study motivation and career alignment questions

actions.reason: Study motivation assessment is critical to determine genuine educational intent vs. immigration intent, core evaluation criteria for Italy student visa

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - University Choice & Acceptance
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include university selection and admission letter questions

actions.reason: University verification and admission letter receipt confirmation are mandatory requirements for Italy student visa processing

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Academic Capability
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include language proficiency and academic preparation questions

actions.reason: Language proficiency (English and/or Italian) and academic capability verification through test scores and GPA is mandatory for Italy student visa approval

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Financial Capability & Proof of Funds
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include financial sponsor and funding questions - critical for Italy student visa

actions.reason: Financial capability verification is critical for Italy student visa - Italian authorities must confirm applicant/sponsor can fund entire education and living expenses

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Home Country Ties & Return Intent
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include post-graduation plans and home country ties questions - critical for Italy student visa

actions.reason: Return home commitment and home country ties are CRITICAL for Italy student visa - Italian authorities must establish genuine student intent and evidence of commitment to return home after studies

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Visa Compliance & Legal Background
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include visa history and legal background questions

actions.reason: Visa compliance and legal clearance are mandatory verification requirements for Italy student visa - any visa violations or criminal history must be disclosed and explained

questionSelectionRules.name: Strong English Proficiency
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has high English test scores (IELTS 8+)

actions.reason: Strong English proficiency significantly strengthens Italy student visa application by confirming student can succeed in English-medium academic environment

questionSelectionRules.name: Weak English Proficiency
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has low English test scores (IELTS below 6.5) or low confidence rating

actions.reason: Weak English proficiency raises concerns about academic success in English-medium courses and requires detailed explanation of support systems and strategies for managing English coursework

questionSelectionRules.name: Italian Language Proficiency Assessment
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when course is taught in Italian or both English and Italian

actions.reason: Italian language proficiency is critical for courses taught partially or fully in Italian - requires demonstration of CEFR level appropriate for academic coursework

questionSelectionRules.name: Strong Academic Record
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has high GPA (3.5+) or strong test scores

actions.reason: Strong academic history demonstrates capability for Italian university coursework and reduces officer concerns about academic success

questionSelectionRules.name: Weak Academic Record
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has low GPA (below 3.0) or low English test scores

actions.reason: Weaker academic record requires detailed explanation of academic preparation strategies and confirmation of financial support for full program duration

questionSelectionRules.name: Strong Financial Capability
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when sponsor income is high (€100,000+ equivalent) or student has full scholarship

actions.reason: Strong financial capability significantly strengthens Italy student visa application by eliminating officer concern about applicant becoming financial burden

questionSelectionRules.name: Weak or Uncertain Financial Capability
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when sponsor income is modest (below €40,000) or available funds barely cover program costs

actions.reason: Limited financial resources require detailed documentation of sponsor income proof, detailed funding plan for all program years, and clear explanation of how expenses will be covered

questionSelectionRules.name: No Scholarship Funding
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student did not receive any scholarship

actions.reason: Absence of scholarship means full reliance on sponsor/personal funds - requires strong evidence of complete financial capability for entire program duration

questionSelectionRules.name: Has Scholarship Funding
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student received any type of scholarship (merit-based, need-based, or partial)

actions.reason: University scholarship significantly strengthens financial capability profile by confirming university investment in student and reducing sponsor burden

questionSelectionRules.name: Strong Home Country Ties
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has multiple home country ties: family, property, job prospects, and strong intent to return

actions.reason: Multiple strong home country ties (family, property, job prospects) provide clear evidence of genuine student intent and commitment to return home, significantly strengthening Italy student visa case

questionSelectionRules.name: Weak Home Country Ties
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has few home country ties or uncertain return plans

actions.reason: Limited home country ties or weak return intent raises officer concerns about genuine student intent and requires detailed, credible explanation of why student will return to home country

questionSelectionRules.name: Plans Part-Time Work During Studies
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student plans to work part-time while studying

actions.reason: Part-time work plans require demonstration of understanding Italy student visa work restrictions (20 hours/week during school terms) and realistic balance with academic commitments

questionSelectionRules.name: Health Insurance & Healthcare Planning
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has documented health insurance and healthcare planning

actions.reason: Valid health insurance for Italy is mandatory requirement - demonstration of proper insurance coverage shows practical preparation and legal compliance

questionSelectionRules.name: Missing Health Insurance Verification
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has not yet secured health insurance for Italy

actions.reason: Health insurance is mandatory for Italy student visa - missing coverage requires immediate explanation and documented plan to secure appropriate insurance before arrival

questionSelectionRules.name: Student Visa Conditions Understanding
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student demonstrates understanding of visa conditions and limitations

actions.reason: Clear understanding of Italy student visa conditions demonstrates serious preparation and commitment to legal compliance during studies

questionSelectionRules.name: Visa Refusal History
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has been denied a visa to any country previously

actions.reason: Visa refusal history is serious concern - requires transparent explanation of refusal reason, evidence that circumstances have changed, and demonstration that applicant is now clearly eligible for Italy student visa

questionSelectionRules.name: Criminal Record or Legal Issues
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has any criminal convictions or legal issues

actions.reason: Criminal history or visa violations are serious impediments to Italy student visa approval - requires full disclosure, detailed explanation of circumstances, evidence of rehabilitation, and assurance of future lawful conduct

questionSelectionRules.name: Has Official Admission Letter
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has received official admission letter from Italian university

actions.reason: Possession of official admission letter confirms legitimate admission to Italian university and student visa eligibility, significantly advancing application readiness

questionSelectionRules.name: Missing Official Admission Letter
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has not yet received admission letter

actions.reason: Official admission letter from Italian university is mandatory for visa application - missing documentation requires explanation of expected timeline and interim acceptance status

questionSelectionRules.name: Accommodation Arrangements Confirmed
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has arranged accommodation in Italy

actions.reason: Confirmed accommodation arrangements demonstrate practical preparation, responsible planning, and readiness for Italian student life

questionSelectionRules.name: Schengen Area Travel Plans
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student plans to travel within Schengen Area during studies

actions.reason: Schengen visa-free travel is benefit of Italy student visa - planned travel within EU requires demonstration that it will not interfere with academic commitments

questionSelectionRules.name: Graduate Student (Master's/PhD)
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is pursuing Master's degree or PhD

actions.reason: Graduate students often present stronger credentials for Italy visa - can articulate specific research goals, have clearer career direction, and typically demonstrate stronger non-immigrant intent with existing professional experience

questionSelectionRules.name: Undergraduate Student (Bachelor's)
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is pursuing Bachelor's degree

actions.reason: Undergraduate students pursuing 4-year programs require careful assessment of return intent and home country ties since long program duration may raise immigration intent concerns

questionSelectionRules.name: Employed with Work Experience
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is currently employed or self-sponsored

actions.reason: Self-sponsored or employed applicant demonstrates maturity, financial independence, clear professional motivation for studies, and strong ability to return to meaningful employment post-graduation

questionSelectionRules.name: Previous Italy Visit Experience
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has visited Italy before

actions.reason: Previous Italy visits demonstrate clean travel history, compliance with visa terms, real familiarity with Italy environment, and opportunity for campus visits which strengthen university commitment

questionSelectionRules.name: No Previous Italy Visit
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has never visited Italy before

actions.reason: No Italy experience requires extra effort to demonstrate detailed university knowledge through virtual research, shows genuine interest despite not visiting campus, and reinforces commitment to specific Italian university

questionSelectionRules.name: High-Risk Profile Combination
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has combination of concerning factors: weak academics + weak finances + weak home country ties

actions.reason: High-risk combination of weak academics + limited finances + weak home country ties requires comprehensive evidence addressing ALL concerns: strong support plan for academics, complete financial documentation, and very clear credible explanation of genuine student intent and return commitment

questionSelectionRules.name: Student from Developing Country with Resources
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is from developing country with strong financial support

actions.reason: Strong financial resources in developing country context often indicate family business or high-status employment, strengthening both financial capability and home country ties arguments for Italy student visa

questionSelectionRules.name: Non-English Medium Education
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student did not study in English medium previously

actions.reason: Non-English prior education requires detailed explanation of English proficiency development, specific strategies for managing English-medium coursework, and discussion of university support systems available

questionSelectionRules.name: Program Career Goals Alignment
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student demonstrates clear alignment between program and career goals

actions.reason: Strong program-career alignment demonstrates thoughtful application and genuine educational motivation, reducing officer concerns about immigration intent

questionSelectionRules.name: Professional Practice Preparation Focus
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student focuses on program's professional preparation and qualifications

actions.reason: Focus on professional qualifications and certifications shows forward-thinking career planning and demonstrates Italy education's practical value in home country context
